skills.name: Lead Qualification Scorecard
skills.description: Produce a scored lead qualification brief against ICP and BANT/MEDDIC criteria with fit score, gaps, and recommended next step.

skills.name: Discovery Call Script
skills.description: Produce a structured discovery call script with opening, discovery questions, talk tracks, and objection prompts tailored to persona and product.

skills.name: Product Demo Agenda
skills.description: Produce a timed product demo agenda customized to the prospect, including objectives, demo flow, proof points, and close ask.

skills.name: Commercial Proposal Outline
skills.description: Produce a structured proposal outline covering value proposition, scope, pricing placeholders, timeline, and decision criteria.

skills.name: Full Sales Proposal Document
skills.description: Produce a complete sales proposal ready for customer review, including executive summary, solution, scope, pricing, and commercial terms.

skills.name: ROI Business Case Brief
skills.description: Produce ROI assumptions, calculation narrative, and a one-page value story comparing baseline costs to expected outcomes.

skills.name: Objection Handling Playbook
skills.description: Produce ready-to-use rebuttals and talk tracks for common sales objections, mapped by persona and product context.

skills.name: Deal Negotiation Plan
skills.description: Produce a negotiation plan with concession ladder, trade structure, walk-away thresholds, and approval checkpoints.

skills.name: Multi-Step Close Plan
skills.description: Produce a multi-step close plan with owners, dates, stakeholder actions, and risk mitigations through signature.

skills.name: Pipeline Health Review
skills.description: Produce a pipeline health summary by stage with coverage, risk flags, stuck deals, and recommended manager actions.

skills.name: Sales Forecast Commentary
skills.description: Produce forecast commentary from the deal list with confidence bands, upside/downside, and commit rationale for the period.

skills.name: Account Stakeholder Map
skills.description: Produce an account map of stakeholders, influence, buying roles, and process steps with access and multi-thread gaps.

skills.name: Territory Coverage Plan
skills.description: Produce a territory plan with account prioritization, coverage model, activity focus, and path to quota for the region.

skills.name: Quota-to-Activity Breakdown
skills.description: Produce a quota breakdown into weekly activity and deal targets using average deal size and win-rate assumptions.

skills.name: Cold Email Sequence
skills.description: Produce a multi-touch cold email sequence with subject lines, body copy, and CTAs tailored to persona and offer.

skills.name: Cold Call Talk Track
skills.description: Produce a cold call script with opener, value hook, discovery probes, objection responses, and meeting ask.

skills.name: LinkedIn Outreach Sequence
skills.description: Produce LinkedIn connection request and follow-up messages personalized to persona, offer, and profile notes.

skills.name: Post-Meeting Follow-Up Email
skills.description: Produce a post-meeting follow-up email capturing decisions, value recap, and clear next steps with owners.

skills.name: Renewal & Expansion Playbook
skills.description: Produce a renewal playbook covering risk assessment, outreach cadence, value reinforcement, and expansion motions for the account.

skills.name: Account Upsell Plan
skills.description: Produce an upsell plan with opportunity paths, usage-based triggers, messaging, and recommended package moves.

skills.name: Cross-Sell Opportunity Plan
skills.description: Produce a cross-sell plan mapping portfolio products to account needs with priority order and talk tracks.

skills.name: Win/Loss Analysis Report
skills.description: Produce a win/loss analysis summarizing decision drivers, competitor impact, process lessons, and recommendations for future deals.

skills.name: Competitor Battlecard
skills.description: Produce a sales battlecard versus a named competitor with differentiators, landmines, trap questions, and win themes.

skills.name: Good-Better-Best Pricing Options
skills.description: Produce good/better/best pricing packages with feature packaging, price anchors, and recommendation guidance for the deal.

skills.name: Discount Approval Brief
skills.description: Produce a discount request brief for leadership approval with deal economics, competitive context, and justification.

skills.name: Mutual Action Plan (MAP)
skills.description: Produce a shared mutual action plan with buyer and seller tasks, milestones, owners, and target close date.

skills.name: RFP Response Draft
skills.description: Produce drafted answers to RFP questions aligned to product capabilities, company proof points, and compliance notes.

skills.name: Security Questionnaire Responses
skills.description: Produce draft responses to security questionnaire items using provided security notes and clear residual-risk callouts.

skills.name: Customer Case Study Brief
skills.description: Produce a sales-ready case study brief with customer context, challenge, solution, quantified results, and proof quotes.

skills.name: Customer Testimonial Request
skills.description: Produce a polite, specific testimonial request message with suggested prompts and preferred formats.

skills.name: Customer Referral Request
skills.description: Produce a referral request message for a satisfied customer with clear ask, ideal intro target, and easy response path.

skills.name: Event/Trade-Show Follow-Up Pack
skills.description: Produce prioritized event follow-up messages for captured leads with personalization hooks and next-step CTAs.

skills.name: Sales-to-CSM Handoff Package
skills.description: Produce a structured handoff package for Customer Success covering account context, deal promises, stakeholders, and success criteria.

skills.name: Sales Call Summary & Actions
skills.description: Produce a structured sales call summary with key discussion points, decisions, risks, and assigned action items.

skills.name: Pipeline Stage Exit Criteria
skills.description: Produce clear exit criteria for each pipeline stage so deals advance only with verified buyer evidence.

skills.name: Sales Motion Playbook Section
skills.description: Produce a playbook section for a named sales motion with steps, talk tracks, exit criteria, and owner roles.

skills.name: ABM Target Account Brief
skills.description: Produce a prioritized ABM target list with ICP fit reasons, tiering, and recommended engagement angles per account.

skills.name: Multi-Threading Contact Plan
skills.description: Produce a multi-threading plan across buyer roles with outreach sequence, messaging, and coverage goals for the account.

skills.name: Champion Enablement Kit
skills.description: Produce champion enablement materials including internal talk track, one-pager, objection answers, and stakeholder map for internal selling.

skills.name: Economic Buyer One-Pager
skills.description: Produce a concise one-pager for the economic buyer covering business case, ROI, risk reduction, and decision ask.

skills.name: Technical Buyer Evaluation Brief
skills.description: Produce a technical evaluation brief for IT/security buyers covering architecture fit, requirements, integrations, and risk mitigations.

skills.name: Legal Review Prep Notes
skills.description: Produce legal review prep with priority contract points, preferred positions, fallback language, and risk notes for negotiation.

skills.name: Commercial QBR Deck Outline
skills.description: Produce a customer QBR deck outline with value delivered, metrics, risks, roadmap, and expansion discussion points.

skills.name: Channel Partner Co-Sell Brief
skills.description: Produce a partner co-sell brief covering opportunity summary, roles, messaging, and joint next steps.

skills.name: Inbound Lead Triage List
skills.description: Produce a triaged inbound lead list with priority scores, routing recommendations, and first-touch guidance per lead.

skills.name: Multi-Channel Outbound Cadence
skills.description: Produce a day-by-day multi-channel outbound cadence with email, call, and social steps for the target persona.

skills.name: Sales Meeting Prep Pack
skills.description: Produce a meeting prep pack with research snapshot, agenda, discovery goals, risk questions, and desired outcomes.

skills.name: Slack Deal Status Update
skills.description: Produce a concise Slack-ready deal status update with stage, next step, risks, and ask for the team.

skills.name: Deal Commission Impact Note
skills.description: Produce a clear explanation of commission impact under the proposed deal structure against the compensation plan.

skills.name: AE Weekly Activity Plan
skills.description: Produce a weekly AE plan balancing pipeline generation, active deals, and quota math against calendar capacity.
